args.code: (() => { const inputs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input')); for (const i of inputs) { if (i.value === '/') { i.focus(); i.select(); document.execCommand('insertText', false, 'backend'); i.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles: true})); i.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {bubbles: true})); return 'set to backend'; } } return 'no input found'; })()
